meta.purpose: Phase 4-A KO/EN badge implementation source data (Day 28+ implementation)

tier_definition.1_direct: Course official site has dedicated /en or /ko pages with translated content
tier_definition.2_accordia_portal: Bookable via Accordia reserve.accordiagolf.com portal with EN/한글/繁體 switcher (machine-translated; JP-only customer service)
tier_definition.3_pgm_portal: Bookable via PGM booking.pacificgolf.co.jp portal with 日本語/EN/한글/繁體 switcher
tier_definition.4_limited: Limited multilingual support: external EN booking link, bilingual menu labels, etc.

courses.name: ララヒルズ油山

courses.evidence: Japanese-only
